name: Wireless Earbuds Pro
description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless earbuds with 30hr battery life, crystal clear audio quality, and ergonomic water-resistant design for all-day comfort.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Professional RGB backlit mechanical keyboard featuring tactile Cherry MX switches, durable aluminum construction, and fully programmable macro keys.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Versatile 7-in-1 multi-port adapter with 4K HDMI output, high-speed USB 3.0 ports, and dedicated SD/MicroSD card readers for seamless connectivity.

name: Portable Monitor 15.6"
description: Ultra-slim 15.6-inch Full HD IPS portable monitor with dual USB-C connectivity, built-in dual speakers, and a foldable protective smart cover stand.

name: Webcam 4K Ultra
description: High-definition 4K webcam with advanced auto-focus, noise-reducing microphones, and a built-in adjustable ring light for professional video calling.

name: Desk Lamp LED
description: Architect-style smart LED desk lamp with adjustable color temperatures, five brightness levels, and a built-in USB charging port for your mobile devices.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Rugged waterproof portable speaker with loud 360° surround sound, deep bass performance, and up to 24 hours of playback on a single charge.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable
description: Premium ergonomic aluminum laptop stand with six adjustable height levels for optimal viewing angles and open ventilation to keep your laptop cool.

name: Gaming Mouse
description: High-performance gaming mouse featuring a 16000 DPI optical sensor, custom RGB lighting zones, and seven programmable buttons for ultimate control.

name: Wireless Charger Pad
description: Universal fast wireless charging pad compatible with all Qi-enabled devices, featuring a non-slip surface and advanced temperature control for safe charging.
